# Prompts Directory

Prompt templates for chat slash commands and module-building flows.

## Shared

- [_conventions.md](_conventions.md) — Single source of truth for varlock, TRY markers, secret naming, and execution conventions. Injected into other prompts automatically.

## Commands (user-facing slash commands)

- [commands/add_integration.md](commands/add_integration.md) — /add-integration: multi-turn wizard to create a new context module from chat
- [commands/add_workflow.md](commands/add_workflow.md) — /add-workflow: multi-turn wizard to create a workflow module (folder of numbered step files)
- [commands/improve_integration.md](commands/improve_integration.md) — /improve-integration: reads an existing module, analyzes gaps, and improves it via PUT
- [commands/download.md](commands/download.md) — /download: generates download links for files written in the session
- [commands/guide.md](commands/guide.md) — /guide: shows loaded modules and suggests prompts to try
- [commands/introduction.md](commands/introduction.md) — /introduction: 4-turn onboarding flow that delegates to /add-integration

## Templates (internal, not user-facing)

- [templates/add_module.md](templates/add_module.md) — Template prompt for generating a module's info.md from codebase analysis
- [templates/adapt_examples.md](templates/adapt_examples.md) — Rules for rewriting code examples to match varlock execution conventions
- [templates/summary.md](templates/summary.md) — Prompt for `/api/modules/{name}/generate` — generates 1-2 sentence module summary from info.md
- [templates/detect_packages.md](templates/detect_packages.md) — Prompt for `/api/modules/{name}/detect-packages` — extracts PyPI package names from info.md
